Toh 287.note: [questionable] Dīrghāgama (長阿含經) → Saddharmasmṛtyupasthāna. These are very different texts (early Buddhist collection vs. Mahāyāna treatise on mindfulness). Parallel relationship is unclear.

Toh 352.note: Li 2021: Fanwang liushier jian jing 梵網六十二見經 = Tshangs pa'i dra pa

Toh 318.note: Li 2021: Guangyi famen jing 廣義法門經 = Don rgyas pa'i chos kyi rnam grangs

Toh 353.note: Li 2021: Dafangbian Fo baoen jing 大方便佛報恩經 = Thabs la mkhas pa chen po sangs rgyas kyis drin la lan blan pa pa'i chos kyi yi ge
Silk 2019: 大方便佛報恩經 Dà fāngbiàn fó bàoēn jīng = Thabs la mkhas pa chen po sangs rgyas kyis drin la lan blan pa pa'i chos kyi yi ge

Toh 341.note: Li 2021: Xianyu jing 賢愚經 = 'Dzangs blun
Silk 2019: 賢愚經 Xiányú jīng = Mdzangs blun gyi mdo

Toh 11.note: Lokakṣema tr. Aṣṭasāhasrikā (道行般若經) parallels Tibetan Daśasāhasrikā Prajñāpāramitā. Both are Prajñāpāramitā recensions. Conze, The Prajñāpāramitā Literature (1978), ch. 2.

Toh 10.note: Kumārajīva tr. Aṣṭasāhasrikā (小品般若波羅蜜經) parallels Tibetan Aṣṭadaśasāhasrikā. Both are Prajñāpāramitā recensions. Conze, The Prajñāpāramitā Literature (1978), ch. 2.

Toh 21.note: Dharmarakṣa tr. Pañcaviṃśatisāhasrikā (光讚般若波羅蜜經) contains Heart Sutra material. Nattier, 'The Heart Sutra: A Chinese Apocryphal Text?' (1992).

Toh 135.note: Li 2021: Jingang sanmei jing 金剛三昧經 = Rdo rje ting nge 'dzin kyi yi ge
Silk 2019: 金剛三昧經 Jīngāng sānmèi jīng = Rdo rje ting nge 'dzin gyi chos kyi yi ge

Toh 256.note: Silk 2019: 大乘善見經 Dàshèng shànjiàn jīng (?) = Chos kyi rgya mo

Toh 241.note: Li 2021: Foshuo baoji sanmei Wenshushili pusa wen fashen jing 佛說寶積三昧文殊師利菩薩問法身經 (?) = Ting nge 'dzin gyi 'khor lo zhes bya ba theg pa chen po'i mdo

Toh 119.note: Silk 2019: 大般涅槃經 Dàbānniè pán jīng = Yongs su mya ngan las 'das pa chen po'i mdo

Dharmakṣema tr. Mahāparinirvāṇasūtra (大般涅槃經, 36 fascicles) parallels Tibetan Mahāparinirvāṇamahāsūtra. T374 (40 fasc.) is the extended version; T375 is the earlier translation. Shimoda Masahiro, A Study of the Mahāparinirvāṇa-sūtra (1997).

Toh 242.note: Silk 2019: 大乘同性經 Dàshèng tóngxìng jīng = Yongs su bsngo ba'i 'khor lo

Toh 239.note: Li 2021: Dasheng daji dizang shilun jing 大乘大集地藏十輪經 = 'Dus pa chen po las sa'i snying po'i 'khor lo bcu pa zhes bya ba theg pa chen po'i mdo
Silk 2019: 大乘大集地藏十輪經 Dàshèng dàjí dìzàng shílún jīng = Sa'i snying po 'khor lo bcu pa'i mdo

Toh 199.note: Li 2021: Foshuo guan Mile pusa shangsheng doushuaitian jing 佛說觀彌勒菩薩上生兜率天經 = Byang chub sems dpa' byams pa dga' ldan gnam du skye ba blangs pa'i mdo
Silk 2019: 佛說觀彌勒菩薩上生兜率天經 Fóshuō guān Mílè púsà shàngshēng Dōushuàitiān jīng = Byang chub sems dpa' byams pa dga' ldan gnam du skye ba blangs pa'i mdo

Toh 174.note: Li 2021: Chishi jing 持世經 = 'Phags pa 'jig rten 'dzin gyis yongs su dris pa zhes bya ba'i mdo
Silk 2019: 持世經 Chíshì jīng = 'Phags pa 'jig rten 'dzin gyis yongs su dris pa zhes bya ba'i mdo

Toh 351.note: Silk 2019: Rgyal bu don grub kyi mdo

Toh 555.note: Li 2021: Jin'guangming zuishengwang jing 金光明最勝王經 = Gser 'od dam pa
Silk 2019: 金光明最勝王經 Jīn guāngmíng zuìshèng wáng jīng = Gser 'od dam pa

Toh 108.note: Li 2021: Lengqie abaduoluo baojing 楞伽阿跋多羅寶經 = Lang kar gshegs pa
Silk 2019: 楞伽阿跋多羅寶經 Léngqié ābáduōluó bǎojīng = Lang kar gshegs pa'i mdo las sangs rgyas thams cad kyi gsung gi snying po'i le'u

Toh 359.note: Silk 2019: 四十二章經 Sìshí'èr zhāng jīng = Mig bcu gnyis pa'i mdo

Toh 359a.note: Li 2021: Sishier zhang jing 四十二章經 = 'Spho bsho zi shī il ṭāng kying / Dum bu zhe gnyis pa zhes bya ba'i mdo

Toh 335.note: Silk 2019: 得道梯橙錫杖經 Dédào tīchéng xīzhàng jīng = 'Khar gsil gyi mdo

Toh 336.note: Silk 2019: 得道梯橙錫杖經 Dédào tīchéng xīzhàng jīng (appendix) = 'Khar gsil 'chang ba'i kun spyod pa'i cho ga

Toh 691.note: Li 2021: Qianshou qianyan Guanshiyin pusa guangda yuanman wuai dabeixin tuoluoni jing 千手千眼觀世音菩薩廣大圓滿無礙大悲心陎羅尼經 = Spyan ras gzigs phyag stong spyan stong thogs pa mi mnga' ba'i gzungs
Silk 2019: 千手千眼觀世音菩薩廣大圓滿無礙大悲心陀羅尼經 Qiānshǒu qiānyǎn Guānshìyīn púsà guǎngdà yuánmǎn wúài dàbēixīn tuóluóní jīng = Spyan ras gzigs phyag stong spyan stong gzungs

Toh 694.note: Li 2021: Zhal bcu gcig pa'i rig ngags kyi snying po
Silk 2019: Zhal bcu gcig pa'i rig ngags kyi snying po

Toh 116.note: 寶篋印陀羅尼經 (Ratnakāraṇḍaka-dhāraṇī) parallels Tibetan Kāraṇḍavyūhasūtra. CBETA maps Toh 116 to T1050; T1077 is an alternative translation.

Toh 1.note: Mahīśāsaka Vinaya (五分律, Buddhajīva tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner, The Earliest Vinaya and the Beginnings of Buddhist Literature (1956).

Toh 6.note: Dharmaguptaka Vinaya (四分律, Buddhayaśas tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayakṣudrakavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner (1956); Clarke, Vinaya Texts (2014).

Toh 1.note: Sarvāstivāda Vinaya (十誦律, Kumārajīva/Puṇyatāra tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner (1956).

Toh 334.note: [questionable] Mahāprajñāpāramitopadeśa → Nandimitrāvadāna. The connection between these texts is unclear. Toh 334 is an avadāna narrative, not a Prajñāpāramitā text.

Toh 3786.note: Mahāprajñāpāramitopadeśa (大智度論, Kumārajīva tr.) is a commentary on the Prajñāpāramitā. Toh 3786 (Abhisamayālaṃkāra) is also a Prajñāpāramitā commentary. Both are part of the Prajñāpāramitā commentarial tradition. Conze (1978).

Toh 259.note: [removed] T49n2034 (開元釋教錄, Kāiyuán Catalog) is a bibliographic catalog, not a parallel text to Toh 259 (Vimalagarbha-dhāraṇī). This mapping appears to be an error.

Silk 2019: 善惡因果經 Shàn'è yīnguǒ jīng = Dge ba dang mi dge ba'i las kyi rnam par smin pa bstan pa

Silk 2019: 天地八陽神咒經 Tiāndì bāyáng shénzhòu jīng = Snang brgyad ces bya ba'i rig sngags
